name: jobhunter
description: Skills for the JobHunter automated job-hunting pipeline — batch-score, tailor CVs, draft cold emails. Designed to be invoked by a paired FastAPI backend (https://github.com/alisadikinma/jobhunter) via subprocess + HTTP callbacks.

plugins.name: jobhunter
plugins.description: 3 skills (job-score, cv-tailor, cold-email) + 3 reference docs (scoring rubric, CV variants, email cadence). Pairs with the JobHunter FastAPI backend.
